title: Bāhubali 2: The Conclusion
tmdbOverview: When Mahendra, the son of Bāhubali, learns about his heritage, he begins to look for answers. His story is juxtaposed with past events that unfolded in the Mahishmati Kingdom.
synopsis: Released in 2017, Bāhubali 2: The Conclusion is a action, adventure and fantasy film from India. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.2 on IMDb. A standout of 2010s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a 12 certification (CH rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
